title: Remove, replace and program electrical and electronic units and assemblies
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Remove, replace and program electrical and electronic units and assemblies demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to remove, replace and program electrical and electronic units and  assemblies

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications are accessed and interpreted1.3 Removal information is accessed and interpreted from manufacturer and component supplier specifications 1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications are accessed and interpreted1.3 Removal information is accessed and interpreted from manufacturer and component supplier specifications 1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to remove, replace and program electrical and electronic units and  assemblies

elements.title: Remove unit and assembly

pcs.text: Unit and assembly are removed using approved methods, tools and equipment and according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Unit and assembly are handled and stored according to manufacturer and component supplier requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Unit and assembly are removed using approved methods, tools and equipment and according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Unit and assembly are handled and stored according to manufacturer and component supplier requirements?

elements.title: Replace unit and assembly

pcs.text: Replacement information is accessed and interpreted from manufacturer and component supplier specifications3.2 Unit and assembly are replaced using approved methods, tools and equipment and according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Replacement information is accessed and interpreted from manufacturer and component supplier specifications3.2 Unit and assembly are replaced using approved methods, tools and equipment and according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Replacement information is accessed and interpreted from manufacturer and component supplier specifications3.2 Unit and assembly are replaced using approved methods, tools and equipment and according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Replace unit and assembly

elements.title: Program unit and assembly

pcs.text: Reprogramming options are analysed and those most appropriate are selected4.2 Component replacement and programming procedures are carried out according to manufacturer and component supplier specifications4.3 Post-replacement testing is carried out to confirm that unit and assembly are operating to manufacturer specifications and that no other problems are present
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Reprogramming options are analysed and those most appropriate are selected4.2 Component replacement and programming procedures are carried out according to manufacturer and component supplier specifications4.3 Post-replacement testing is carried out to confirm that unit and assembly are operating to manufacturer specifications and that no other problems are present?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Reprogramming options are analysed and those most appropriate are selected4.2 Component replacement and programming procedures are carried out according to manufacturer and component supplier specifications4.3 Post-replacement testing is carried out to confirm that unit and assembly are operating to manufacturer specifications and that no other problems are present.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Program unit and assembly

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle or machinery is presented ready for use5.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected5.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored and any faulty electrical equipment is identified, tagged and isolated according to workplace procedures5.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
